title: Arsenal expect Havertz to play in title run-in
summary: Kai Havertz suffered a muscular injury against Newcastle but is expected to feature in Arsenal's title run-in. The forward's availability is crucial as Arsenal pushes for a Premier League title challenge.
content: Arsenal expect Kai Havertz to play a part in their title run-in despite the forward suffering a muscular injury against Newcastle.

title: Southampton and Ipswich face automatic promotion showdown
summary: Southampton must defeat Ipswich to extend their Championship promotion fight to the final day, while an Ipswich win would effectively secure their return to the Premier League. The result will determine which team's promotion path extends beyond this match.
content: Southampton must beat Ipswich to take their Championship promotion push to the final day, but a win for Town would see them all but back in the Premier League.

zh.title: 南安普顿与伊普斯维奇面临直升英超对决

title: Who will win the Champions League? Place your vote
summary: Four teams remain in this season's Champions League with the final scheduled for May 30, and BBC Sport examines statistics and expert predictions for the tournament's climax. The competition narrows down Europe's elite teams in their pursuit of continental glory.
content: Thirty-two teams have fallen in this season's Champions League and four remain - so who will become kings of Europe on 30 May? BBC Sport delves into the stats, while experts make predictions.

title: Rangers blink but twists still to come in colossal title race
summary: The Scottish Premiership title race remains wide open with multiple twists still to unfold before the season concludes. Tom English's analysis suggests the outcome is far from decided and either Rangers or their rivals remain in contention.

title: Champions League at risk for Man Utd so what next for Skinner?

content: Next season, leagues will be allowed to select from a series of trials to try to stop the goalkeeper tactical time-out. BBC Sport looks at the proposals.

summary: Real Madrid striker Kylian Mbappe is doubtful for next month's El Clasico against Barcelona due to a hamstring injury. The star player's availability is crucial for Real Madrid's chances in the highly anticipated rivalry match.

title: Lingard on playing in Brazil and Man Utd
summary: Jesse Lingard talks about his move to Corinthians and argues that Michael Carrick should become Manchester United's manager. The interview explores his perspectives on his former club's direction.

title: Pulisic goalless streak hits 16, tying career worst

content: Christian Pulisic equaled his worst goalless streak after he was unable to find the back of the net in AC Milan's 0-0 draw with Juventus on Sunday.

title: American Albert, 16, tops Reyna Bundesliga mark
summary: Mathis Albert became the youngest American to debut in the Bundesliga at age 16 years, 11 months, and 5 days playing for Borussia Dortmund. He surpassed the previous American record set by Gio Reyna.
content: Mathis Albert became the youngest American to play in the Bundesliga when he made his debut for Borussia Dortmund on Sunday at the age of 16 years, 11 months and 5 days.

title: Chelsea interim boss relieved after FA Cup win

content: Chelsea interim coach Calum McFarlane said he felt "relief" after guiding the club to the FA Cup final days with a 1-0 semifinal win against Leeds United, three days after replacing Liam Rosenior following his dismissal after just 106 days in charge.

title: Goalkeepers sent off after brawl in Spain's 2nd tier

content: A second-division soccer game in Spain ended in a brawl Sunday after Zaragoza goalkeeper Esteban Andrada punched Huesca defender Jorge Pulido in the face.
